content.speakerText: Your tuition's paid in full, but your housing fee is still pending.
content.speakerTextCn: 学费已付清，但住宿费还没交。

options.text: Can I get a discount instead?
I already paid everything last week.
When is the next semester starting?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I'll pay it online tonight.'是针对欠费情况的合理回应，符合使用说明中'立即询问支付方式'的要求。选项2询问折扣，与缴费义务无关；选项3否认欠费，与事实矛盾；选项4转移话题，未回应核心问题。

content.speakerText: You’ve got a $200 refund due—want it sent to your bank or as a check?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有200美元退款，要打到银行卡还是寄支票？

options.text: Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local address yet.
Can I use it to pay for next term’s tuition?
I think there’s been a mistake—I didn’t overpay.
How long will it take to arrive?

content.explanation: 正确答案'Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local address yet.'是标准回应之一，符合场景中'根据自身情况选择退款方式'的要求。选项2提出用途变更，属于额外请求，非标准回应；选项3质疑退款合理性，虽可接受但非首选；选项4询问时间，未直接回应选择要求。

content.speakerText: I see your account shows a $50 balance due for the lab fee. Would you like to settle it now?
content.speakerTextCn: 我看到你的账户还欠50美元的实验费，现在要支付吗？

options.text: Yes, I'll pay it by credit card right away.
Can you waive the fee since I'm an international student?
I didn't know there was a lab fee.
When is the next class meeting?

content.explanation: 正确答案'Yes, I'll pay it by credit card right away.'直接回应支付请求，符合确认缴费场景的核心行为。选项2请求减免，属非标准请求；选项3表达惊讶��未解决问题；选项4完全跑题，未回应缴费请求。

content.template: I thought I paid it—can you check ___ again?
content.hint: 当你怀疑自己已缴费但系统显示未付时，常用此句型请求重新核查
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：check again（重新核查）

content.template: Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local ___ yet.
content.hint: 选择银行转账时，常因没有本地地址而无法接收支票

content.template: Could you tell me my current ___ balance?
content.hint: 在确认缴费时，询问当前账户余额是常见表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：account balance（账户余额）

content.speakerText: Your tuition's paid in full, but your housing fee is still pending.
content.speakerTextCn: 学费已付清，但住宿费还没交。
expectedAnswers: Oh no! How do I pay it now?
I thought I already paid it—could you double-check the system?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应欠费问题并提出解决方案或请求核查
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气自然，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了pay, fee, online, check等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You’ve got a $200 refund due—want it sent to your bank or as a check?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有200美元退款，要打到银行卡还是寄支票？
expectedAnswers: Bank transfer, please—I don't have a local address yet.
Check’s fine—I'll pick it up next week.
Wait, refund? I didn’t overpay—could you explain why?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确选择退款方式或合理质疑退款原因
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了bank transfer, check, pick up等正确表达
表达自然度：语气自然，符合真实对话场景
关键词覆盖：使用了refund, bank, check, address等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Your account shows a $75 balance for the student activity fee. Would you like to pay it now?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的账户显示有75美元的学生活动费未付，现在要支付吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, I'll pay it with my debit card right now.
Can I pay it next week? I'm waiting for my scholarship to come through.
I didn't realize there was a fee—could you send me the payment link?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应是否支付，或提出合理延迟/澄清请求
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合日常校园沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了balance, pay, fee, payment link, debit card等场景关键词
